prompt:
Goal: Create a minimalist fashion editorial presentation board for a modern Korean style campaign.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 layout, clean white background, high-end magazine look, generous margins, crisp alignment.

Headline: Place a large bold uppercase black sans-serif headline in the top-left reading “ELEGANCE REDEFINED: MODERN KOREAN STYLE”. Use two lines, tight leading, strong editorial typography.

Layout: Below the headline, arrange exactly 4 tall vertical fashion photographs in a single row with even spacing and pale studio backgrounds. Each photo should have a refined neutral-gray or off-white backdrop and soft natural studio lighting. The faces may be softly anonymized or obscured to keep the focus on clothing and silhouette.

Photo count and subject details:
1. Left photo: front-facing female model wearing a sharply tailored black structured blazer dress, deep V neckline, fitted waist, small circular button detail, minimal silver necklace, straight dark hair, calm luxury styling.
2. Second photo: side-profile female model in an oversized white button-up shirt with cream trousers, loose sleeves, relaxed movement, black shoulder-length hair blowing slightly, understated Korean minimalist styling.
3. Third photo: three-quarter back view female model wearing a rich emerald green tailored jacket, long straight dark hair, elegant posture, clean seams and refined silhouette.
4. Right photo: full-body androgynous or female model in a flowing beige trench coat over wide-leg beige trousers, dramatic long coat, belted waist, black pointed shoes, confident fashion pose with one leg extended.

Footer text: Center a very small uppercase black credit line along the bottom margin reading “SHOT BY JUNI CHOI | MODEL: SO-HYUN KIM | STYLING: JUNG-MIN LEE | @KFA_STUDIO”.

Visual style: Korean fashion magazine editorial, understated luxury, muted palette of black, white, emerald green, and beige, clean geometry, premium styling, soft shadows, realistic photographic quality.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 image panels, no extra photos, no logos except the footer handle, no decorative graphics, no clutter, maintain strong white space and precise grid alignment.
